meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't scale projects (Advanced Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't scale projects. A Advanced-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Scale Your Freelance SaaS: The Antigravity Project Template
content.seo_description: Stop struggling to scale. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to automate architecture, ship faster, and double your freelance output.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template eliminates scaling bottlenecks by providing a standardized, modular infrastructure. By pairing this framework with Claude Code, you automate boilerplate architecture and repetitive logic. This combination enables you to ship production-ready SaaS applications in hours, not weeks, while maintaining high-code quality and scalability for every client.
content.intro:
You’re trapped in the cycle of 'bespoke' development. Every new client project feels like starting from zero, wrestling with folder structures, auth middleware, and database migrations. You aren't scaling; you're just working harder, sacrificing your margins to build the same foundational components over and over again while the clock ticks against your profitability.

It’s time to move from artisan coder to systems architect. The Antigravity project template is the industry-standard blueprint for high-velocity SaaS delivery. By standardizing your stack, you stop reinventing the wheel and start focusing on high-value features that command premium rates. This isn't just about speed; it's about building a repeatable engine that makes your freelance business bulletproof.

steps.title: Initialize Modular Architecture
steps.description: Establish the root structure using the Antigravity CLI to ensure type-safety and dependency injection are baked into the core from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new enterprise SaaS project using the Antigravity modular template. Include support for Next.js, PostgreSQL, and global middleware.

steps.title: Automate Schema Synchronization
steps.description: Align your database schema with your API definitions instantly to prevent runtime errors during rapid iteration cycles.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the existing schema and generate the corresponding TypeORM entities and API validation schemas.

steps.title: Inject Feature-Specific Boilerplate
steps.description: Use Claude Code to read the Antigravity design patterns and inject new feature modules without breaking existing dependencies.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a new CRUD module for 'UserSubscription' following the project's existing repository pattern.

steps.title: Implement Automated Testing Suites
steps.description: Generate comprehensive unit and integration tests that adhere to the Antigravity testing standards to ensure your code remains scalable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Jest integration tests for the newly created UserSubscription service, covering edge cases and error handling.

steps.title: Continuous Deployment Integration
steps.description: Configure the deployment pipeline to automatically lint, test, and deploy the modular project to your production environment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a CI/CD workflow that validates the project structure against Antigravity standards before deployment.

pro_tips: Always store your frequently used Antigravity prompts in a local 'prompts.json' file to maintain consistency across different client projects.
Use Claude Code's 'memory' feature to teach it your specific coding style preferences once, so you don't have to repeat them in every prompt.
When scaling, prioritize 'feature-flagging' directly within the Antigravity template to allow for client-specific customizations without code forks.
Run periodic 'refactor-lint' commands using Claude Code to ensure your growing codebase doesn't drift from the original Antigravity architecture.
Leverage the modular nature of the template to sell 'feature packs' to your existing clients as a recurring revenue stream.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is live, audit your build time. Use the data from your first three projects to optimize your Antigravity template further, creating a 'golden path' that allows you to launch a base SaaS in under 60 minutes.
content.conversion_block: Stop building from scratch and start scaling your freelance empire with a professional, repeatable framework. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
